name: c4-marketplace
description: Claude {Claude Code} Code orchestrator. Multi-machine fleet dispatch, cron scheduler, RBAC + audit log, PM kanban, workflow engine, NL → plan.

plugins.name: c4
plugins.description: Spawn, supervise, and merge parallel Claude Code workers via the c4 daemon. Includes the c4-orchestrator skill that teaches Claude how to use the c4 CLI for fleet dispatch, scheduler, audit, board, and workflows.
